_description: B2B Multi-Tenant. Each customer (company, team, workspace) gets their own org under the service. Customers can self-register or be provisioned by admin. Users within each customer org are isolated from other customers. Best for: B2B SaaS, team collaboration tools, project management platforms.
_examples: Project management — each company has its own workspace with isolated projects
CRM — each sales team has its own pipeline and contacts
Analytics platform — each customer has isolated dashboards and data

tiers.description: Platform org — owns permissions, global admin, API keys
Customer org — one per customer/company/workspace. Created during onboarding or self-service.

onboarding._note: First user in each customer org becomes owner. Owner invites rest of team.

service_accounts._note: Platform-level service accounts for backend integrations. Customer-level service accounts for customer-owned automations (webhooks, CI/CD).

delegation._note: Optional. Enable if customer admins need vacation coverage or support impersonation.

sso._note: Optional per-customer. Enterprise customers may require SSO via their corporate IdP. Each customer org can configure its own SAML provider.

teams._note: Optional. Enable if customers need sub-groups within their org (e.g., project teams, departments).

_zero_config_note: Each customer org inherits permissions from service org via Zanzibar parent relationship. Users get permissions from customer org membership. Cross-tenant isolation is structural — no data leaks between customer orgs.
